sentences.target: La rencontre commence dans dix minutes.

translations.fr: La rencontre commence dans dix minutes.
translations.en: The match starts in ten minutes.
translations.es: El partido empieza en diez minutos.
translations.de: Das Spiel beginnt in zehn Minuten.
translations.it: La partita inizia tra dieci minuti.
translations.zh-Hans: 比赛将在十分钟后开始。
translations.yue: 比賽會喺十分鐘之後開始。
translations.pt: O jogo começa em dez minutos.
translations.vi: Trận đấu sẽ bắt đầu sau mười phút.
translations.nl: De wedstrijd begint over tien minuten.
translations.hu: A meccs tíz perc múlva kezdődik.
translations.hi: मैच दस मिनट में शुरू होगा.
translations.pl: Mecz zaczyna się za dziesięć minut.
translations.el: Ο αγώνας ξεκινά σε δέκα λεπτά.
translations.ja: 試合は10分後に始まります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (feminine singular) introducing the noun; agrees in gender and number with 'rencontre'.
Common noun (feminine); head of the noun phrase; refers to an encounter/meeting.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject 'rencontre'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement ('in ten minutes').
Cardinal numeral modifying 'minutes'; functions as a numeric determiner.
Common noun (plural); time unit; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: On fête notre rencontre chaque année.

translations.fr: On fête notre rencontre chaque année.
translations.en: We celebrate our meeting every year.
translations.es: Celebramos cada año el día en que nos conocimos.
translations.de: Wir feiern jedes Jahr den Tag, an dem wir uns kennengelernt haben.
translations.it: Festeggiamo ogni anno il giorno in cui ci siamo conosciuti.
translations.ko: 우리는 매년 우리가 처음 만난 날을 기념해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们每年都庆祝我们相识的那一天。
translations.yue: 我哋每年都慶祝我哋相識嗰日。
translations.ru: Мы каждый год отмечаем день, когда познакомились.
translations.pt: Celebramos todos os anos o dia em que nos conhecemos.
translations.he: אנחנו חוגגים בכל שנה את היום שבו הכרנו.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi kỷ niệm ngày chúng tôi gặp nhau mỗi năm.
translations.nl: We vieren elk jaar de dag waarop we elkaar hebben ontmoet.
translations.uk: Ми щороку святкуємо день, коли познайомилися.
translations.hu: Minden évben megünnepeljük azt a napot, amikor megismerkedtünk.
translations.hi: हम हर साल उस दिन का जश्न मनाते हैं जब हम मिले थे.
translations.pl: Co roku świętujemy dzień, kiedy się poznaliśmy.
translations.el: Κάθε χρόνο γιορτάζουμε την ημέρα που γνωριστήκαμε.
translations.nb: Vi feirer hvert år dagen vi møttes.
translations.id: Kami merayakan hari saat kami bertemu setiap tahun.
translations.sv: Vi firar varje år dagen då vi träffades.
translations.ro: Sărbătorim în fiecare an ziua în care ne-am cunoscut.
translations.cs: Každý rok slavíme den, kdy jsme se poznali.
translations.da: Vi fejrer hvert år dagen, hvor vi mødtes.
translations.fi: Joka vuosi juhlimme päivää, jolloin tapasimme.
translations.ja: 私たちは毎年、出会った日を祝います。

tokens.explanation: Personal/impersonal subject pronoun (3rd person singular form, often meaning 'we' in colloquial usage); subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object ('notre rencontre').
Possessive determiner (1st person plural) modifying 'rencontre'.
Common noun (feminine); direct object of 'fête'.
Determiner of distribution quantifying the noun 'année' ('each year').
Common noun (feminine); forms a temporal adverbial phrase with 'chaque'.

sentences.target: Nous parlons de cette rencontre demain.

translations.fr: Nous parlons de cette rencontre demain.
translations.en: We talk about that meeting tomorrow.
translations.de: Morgen sprechen wir über die Besprechung.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们明天讨论那次会议。
translations.yue: 我哋聽日會討論嗰次會議。
translations.ru: Мы поговорим о той встрече завтра.
translations.vi: Ngày mai chúng tôi sẽ bàn về cuộc họp đó.
translations.nl: Morgen praten we over die vergadering.
translations.uk: Ми поговоримо про ту зустріч завтра.
translations.hi: हम कल उस बैठक के बारे में बात करेंगे.
translations.el: Αύριο θα μιλήσουμε για εκείνη τη συνάντηση.
translations.nb: I morgen snakker vi om det møtet.
translations.id: Besok kita akan membicarakan rapat itu.
translations.sv: I morgon pratar vi om det där mötet.
translations.ro: Mâine vom vorbi despre acea ședință.
translations.cs: Zítra budeme mluvit o té schůzce.
translations.da: I morgen taler vi om det møde.
translations.ja: 明日、その会議について話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person plural); subject of 'parlons'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; 'parler de' selects a prepositional complement.
Preposition introducing the complement 'cette rencontre' (here meaning 'about').
Demonstrative determiner (feminine singular) modifying 'rencontre'.
Common noun (feminine); object of the preposition 'de'.
Adverb of time; sentence-level temporal modifier.

sentences.target: Leur rencontre se passe bien aujourd’hui.

translations.fr: Leur rencontre se passe bien aujourd’hui.
translations.en: Their meeting is going well today.
translations.it: Il loro incontro sta andando bene oggi.
translations.ko: 오늘 그들의 만남은 잘 진행되고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们的会面今天进展顺利。
translations.yue: 佢哋今日嘅見面進展順利。
translations.pt: A reunião deles está indo bem hoje.
translations.vi: Cuộc gặp của họ hôm nay đang diễn ra tốt đẹp.
translations.hi: आज उनकी मुलाकात अच्छी चल रही है.
translations.el: Η συνάντησή τους πάει καλά σήμερα.
translations.nb: Møtet deres går bra i dag.
translations.id: Pertemuan mereka berjalan dengan baik hari ini.
translations.sv: Deras möte går bra i dag.
translations.da: Deres møde går godt i dag.
translations.ja: 彼らの会合は今日うまくいっています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (3rd person plural) modifying 'rencontre'.
Common noun (feminine); subject of the pronominal verb phrase 'se passe'.
Clitic reflexive pronoun marking the pronominal construction 'se passer'; linked to the subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; in pronominal use means 'to happen/unfold'.
Adverb of manner modifying 'se passe'.
Adverb of time; temporal adjunct specifying when the event occurs.

jp: La rencontre commence dans dix minutes.
On fête notre rencontre chaque année.
Nous parlons de cette rencontre demain.
Leur rencontre se passe bien aujourd’hui.
fr: La rencontre commence dans dix minutes.
On fête notre rencontre chaque année.
Nous parlons de cette rencontre demain.
Leur rencontre se passe bien aujourd’hui.
en: The match starts in ten minutes.
We celebrate our meeting every year.
We talk about that meeting tomorrow.
Their meeting is going well today.
